path.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--foreground); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 4px;
fill: none; stroke: var(--foreground); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 6px;
stroke: var(--foreground); fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; transform-origin: 25px 25px; stroke-width: 2px;
